dialogueLines.dialogueText: Hey! Watch it, buddy! You almost knocked over Granny's favorite plant!
As if you're not causing enough problems in this town. You're nothing but a no-good troublemaker.
I oughta kick you out of this town once and for all. You gonna face me or what?
Duke, right? I know I'm in no position to ask for anything, but please, Granny's all I have.
She took me in and raised me as her own. And this business means everything to her.
If you win, could you take it easy on her? I'd owe you a life debt.
